data.title: Forethought AI exceeds $1B in ROI for customers, accelerates with new products; strengthens enterprise AI adoption.
data.description: In San Francisco, Forethought, a top provider of AI technology for customer experience, revealed a major achievement by generating over $1 billion in returns on investment for clients since its establishment in 2018. The company introduced three new products recently - Headless Forethought, Custom Insights, and Browser Agent - resulting in a surge in the adoption of Forethought's AI solutions by enterprises. This advancement allows businesses comprehensive authority to create and implement AI across their operations effectively.

data.title: TailorCare's study shows their MSK program benefits complex MA patients, with personalized care improving outcomes.
data.description: A reputable specialty value-based care organization called TailorCare based in Nashville, Tennessee, disclosed initial results from an internal research study focusing on enhancing musculoskeletal health. The study concentrated on a group within Medicare Advantage (MA) and revealed promising outcomes. The data suggested that TailorCare's individualized care coordination system, supported by advanced data analytics and artificial intelligence (AI), effectively enhanced outcomes for challenging MA patients with numerous comorbid conditions. This study demonstrates that TailorCare's approach significantly benefits complex MA patients, showcasing improvements in their health outcomes.

data.title: Butter Payments boosts subscription revenue by 56% YoY with new products Payments Score and Outreach in 2026.
data.description: In San Francisco, Butter Payments, a top payments recovery platform, revealed a 56% increase in subscription revenue year-over-year (YoY). This surge highlights the platform's success and the rising interest from subscription brands aiming to minimize involuntary churn. Butter is expanding its offerings by introducing two new products in 2026, Payments Score, and Outreach. These additions mark the inception of a comprehensive payment recovery solution, driven by advanced AI technology.

data.title: Diodes Inc releases PI2MEQX2505Q: 2.5Gbps MIPI D-PHY ReDriver for automotive systems. Features 4 data lanes, 1 clock lane, complies with MIPI D-PHY 1.2 protocol.
data.description: Diodes Incorporated, a leading manufacturer listed on Nasdaq with the ticker symbol DIOD, has introduced the automotive-compliant PI2MEQX2505Q. This latest release is a 1.8V, 2.5Gbps MIPI D-PHY ReDriver that includes four differential data lanes and one clock lane. It is tailored for the MIPI D-PHY 1.2 protocol, serving to enhance D-PHY signaling in scenarios involving PCB traces, connectors, and cables. The device aims to optimize electrical performance from a CSI-2/DSI source to a sink by compensating for potential issues in the transmission channels.

data.title: Solidus Labs launches job board & guide to address compliance talent gap in crypto industry by 2026.
data.description: In New York, Solidus Labs has introduced a Digital Asset Compliance Job Board and a Talent & Salary Guide for 2026 to address the increasing compliance talent shortage in the cryptocurrency sector. This initiative aims to bridge the gap by providing resources for professionals seeking roles in compliance.

data.title: Zelis® launches ZAPP Edge℠ to enhance healthcare provider payments with ACH-enabled transactions and data insights.
data.description: Zelis®, a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider in Boston, has launched ZAPP Edge℠, an enhanced platform aimed at simplifying reimbursement for medical providers. This innovation offers improved transparency and control throughout the payment process. ZAPP Edge revolutionizes provider reimbursement by consolidating ACH-enabled payments, remittance data, and denial insights from numerous payers into a unified system. This streamlined approach replaces the previously disjointed and cumbersome process.

data.title: N3XT partners with Fireblocks for USD payments within platform, $5 trillion secured annually.
data.description: N3XT, a blockchain-driven narrow bank specializing in instant B2B payments, has revealed a key partnership with Fireblocks. Fireblocks, a renowned enterprise platform handling over $5 trillion in digital asset transfers each year, will now allow its users to seamlessly control and transfer U.S. dollar payments within their current operations. This integration eliminates the necessity for external banking interfaces or outdated payment structures. Through this collaboration, N3XT's technology will be integrated into Fireblocks' system, offering added convenience and efficiency for users.

data.title: VergeSense unveils Large Spatial Model (LSM) for workplace utilization prediction. Trained on 8 years of data across 200M sq ft.
data.description: VergeSense, a prominent player in occupancy intelligence, unveiled its latest innovation, the Large Spatial Model (LSM). This cutting-edge AI model is designed to forecast workplace usage and needs. It has been developed using data collected over eight years, encompassing behavior in more than 200 million square feet of office areas. The LSM empowers advanced predictive features within workplace technology. In recent years, AI has witnessed significant advancements, enhancing its predictive capabilities.

data.title: Wallarm expands to secure APIs & AI at scale. Major milestones include 41% employee growth in 2025. #ApiSecurity #AIProtection
data.description: In San Francisco, Wallarm, a prominent API security company, declared significant achievements in product development, open-source involvement, team expansion, and industry education. These milestones highlight the company's robust progress amidst rising API and AI-related security risks globally. The company saw substantial growth in 2025, increasing its workforce by 41%, reflecting its commitment to investing in its team. The executive leadership team has also seen enhancements to align with the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Automata raises $45M in Series C funding for AI-ready lab automation to build integrated platforms for life sciences.
data.description: An innovative lab automation company, Automata, based in London, has successfully concluded a Series C funding round with investors showing strong support. The funding round raised a notable $45 million, with leading investment from Dimension. Additionally, Danaher Ventures, Tru Arrow Partners, Octopus Ventures, Entrepreneurs First, and various other contributors also participated in this round. Noteworthy is the strategic investment collaboration with Danaher Corporation. Dr. Murali Venkatesan, serving as the Global Head of Danaher Ventures and Vice President of Science, expressed enthusiasm regarding the newly forged partnership. Automata is distinguished for developing fully integrated platforms tailored for life sciences and equipped with advanced AI capabilities.

data.title: Majority of college students use AI for classwork, but universities lack AI courses, leaving students unprepared for future careers - Honorlock study.
data.description: A recent study by Honorlock in Boca Raton, Florida revealed a significant deficiency in college students' readiness for AI-driven careers, highlighting a pressing need for enhanced preparation. The research brings attention to the growing importance of equipping students with skills tailored for the evolving job market, where artificial intelligence plays a prominent role. This finding underscores the necessity for educational institutions to adapt their curricula to better align with industry demands, ensuring graduates are adequately equipped for the modern workforce.

data.title: Global smartphone market grew 2% in 2025 to 1.25 billion units. Memory headwinds expected in 2026.
data.description: According to recent research by Omdia, global smartphone shipments experienced a 2% increase in 2025, reaching a total of 1.25 billion units. This represents the highest annual level since 2021. All regions saw growth compared to the previous year, except for Greater China, which saw a slight decline due to the waning impact of a national subsidy program that had initially boosted its performance in early 2025. The market was primarily driven by strong demand from both upgraders and replacement buyers, leading to record-breaking sales for several vendors.

data.title: New global student social network wants to connect universities and empower students, using real student voices.
data.description: A recently launched international student social network aims to revolutionize the university selection process by prioritizing authentic student opinions over rankings and marketing propaganda. Serving as a centralized platform for university exploration and student interactions, the network connects students globally...

data.title: Endeavor Bancorp's net income for Q4 2025 was $1.7 million, showcasing NIM expansion, down from $1.73M in Q3 and up from $1.08M in Q4 2024.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in San Diego, Endeavor Bancorp, trading as OTCQX: EDVR, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company, which owns Endeavor Bank, reported a net income of $1.70 million, translating to $0.45 per diluted share. This figure shows a slight decline from the third quarter of 2025, where net income was $1.73 million or $0.46 per diluted share. When compared to the fourth quarter of 2024, where net income was $1.08 million, or $0.29 per diluted share, there is noticeable growth. It's important to note that all financial results provided are unaudited.

data.title: Leggett & Platt to release 4Q & full year earnings on Feb 11, 2026, with a call on Feb 12 at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Carthage, Missouri, January 29, 2026 - Leggett & Platt (NYSE:LEG), a manufacturer of engineered products for various markets, will announce its fourth quarter and full-year earnings on February 11, 2026, post-market close. The company's quarterly conference call to discuss these results, annual guidance, market conditions, and company initiatives is scheduled for February 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EST (7:30 a.m. CST).
